spec_match.rationale: The visible labels, generated header mapping, and live CSS snippet now use the standard hyphenated modifiers: cross-origin(), referrer-policy(), and integrity().

interactive.rationale: The playground features interactive radio selectors for all three request modifiers that dynamically refresh the HTTP header mapping table and the output block.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned perfectly with the parent description of showing exactly which headers are added or suppressed by each modifier.

edge_cases.rationale: Provides excellent edge-case details covering CORS mode parameters (Sec-Fetch-Mode), credentials (Cookie omission), and Referer paths.

references.rationale: The page now includes direct links to ChromeStatus, the CSS Values 5 request URL modifiers section, and MDN's url() reference.

design_system.rationale: Conforms nicely to the layout conventions, borders, and typographic styles of the showcase site.

summary: A useful security-oriented playground mapping CSS request modifiers to HTTP headers. The generated CSS and header mapping now use the correct hyphenated cross-origin() and referrer-policy() syntax, and the page includes direct reference links for follow-up reading.
